name: artdream-walls-4at12-aci
_comment: Cast-in-place walls for Empty_project_ArtDreamTJ4X9 (WRTEST set). #4@12 each-face each-way, #4 crossties @24x24, 1-1/2in cover to tie face. ACI 318-19 anchorage with f'c=5000psi (CONCR_5), Grade-60. Lengths in inches; feet-inches strings also accepted. NOTE: the face-mesh vertical-bar 1.3*ld TOP PROJECTION requested cannot be expressed here — see chat. Corner/T laps DO use Class B = 1.3*ld in ACI mode.
_corners_note: Corner/T continuity is now the extended end U-bar (пэшка) from the edges.ends builder; the old L-bar corner/tJunction builders were removed.
_projections_help: Out-of-wall dowels of the main field bars. top/bottom continue the verticals; ends continue the horizontals (skipped where a corner/T continues the wall). length/bendLength 0 = ACI ld. bendDir: Interior|Exterior|Alternate. All disabled here.
